justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially misinterpreted "in 3 days" as June 4th, when the current date was June 1st, but later correctly identified the user's preferred days of the week.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability without offering a diverse range of alternative options or proactively suggesting broader search parameters.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made numerous redundant API calls and repeatedly asked the user to suggest new times, leading to a very inefficient conversation.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was extremely frustrating due to the agent's inability to find any appointments, repeated apologies, and lack of proactive problem-solving.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent struggled to recover from initial unavailability, often re-checking the same or very similar time slots and failing to expand the search effectively until explicitly prompted by the user.

overall_notes: The agent's performance was severely hampered by the lack of available appointments, but its inability to proactively suggest a wider range of options or escalate the issue contributed significantly to the negative customer experience.
